name: Smiling Pond Frog
subject: animals/frog
prompt: a cheerful round cartoon frog sitting upright, two big bulging eyes on top of its head, a wide friendly smile, smooth skin, four webbed feet, and a plump body, looking happy and simple

name: Frog on a Lily Pad
subject: animals/frog
prompt: a happy frog sitting on a round lily pad floating on water, a single lily flower blooming beside it, gentle water ripples around the pad, the frog mid-smile with its front feet tucked together

name: Red-Eyed Tree Frog
subject: animals/frog
prompt: a slender tree frog clinging to a leafy branch, large round eyes, long legs with rounded sticky toe pads gripping the leaf, a sleek body, and a couple of broad jungle leaves around it

name: Big Bullfrog
subject: animals/frog
prompt: a large wide bullfrog crouched low to the ground, a very wide mouth, big round eyes, a puffed-out throat as if croaking, bumpy skin texture suggested with simple shapes, sitting among a few blades of grass

name: Poison Dart Frog
subject: animals/frog
prompt: a small tropical poison dart frog perched on a leaf, a smooth round body with bold patches and spots across its back and legs for coloring, big bright eyes, tiny toes, a single tropical flower nearby

name: Baby Froglet
subject: animals/frog
prompt: a tiny cute baby frog with an extra-large head and oversized sparkly eyes, a little stub of a tail still showing as a froglet, sitting on a small pebble, short stubby legs, an adorable shy smile

name: Tadpole to Frog
subject: animals/frog
prompt: a simple life-cycle scene showing a round tadpole with a long tail swimming, a tadpole growing tiny back legs, and a young frog with four legs, arranged left to right underwater with a few bubbles

name: Leaping Frog
subject: animals/frog
prompt: an energetic frog caught mid-leap through the air, back legs stretched out long behind it and front legs reaching forward, body arched, an excited open-mouth smile, a lily pad below it

name: Frog Close-Up Face
subject: animals/frog
prompt: a close-up front-facing portrait of a friendly frog's face filling the frame, two huge round eyes with big highlights, a wide curving smile, two small nostrils, and smooth cheeks, very simple and bold

name: Two Frog Friends
subject: animals/frog
prompt: two cheerful frogs sitting side by side on a log, one slightly bigger than the other, both smiling and looking at each other, their front feet almost touching, a small leaf and a flower nearby

name: Frog Catching a Fly
subject: animals/frog

name: Frogs at the Pond
subject: animals/frog
prompt: a detailed pond scene with a few frogs on lily pads, tall cattails and reeds along the edge, a dragonfly skimming above the water, ripples on the surface, and a couple of lily flowers in bloom
